case_title: JOANNE CALABRESE VS. NOLAN BROTHERS PAINTING

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CALABRESE, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN BROTHERS PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALABRESE, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN BROTHERS PAINTING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALABRESE, JOANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOLAN BROTHERS PAINTING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-25-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN BROTHERS PAINTING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
